features: Comfortable Material: These non-metal braided hair tie is made of soft woven material, no crease no damage for hair, no metal in these hair bands, which will be safer and won't bring harm to your scalp.
Package include: 8 pieces of elastic hair ties braided ponytail holders, enough for you to use for a long time and you are free to choose favourite color.
Strong Elastic: Outer diameter the grab and go hair ties is about 2.8 inch, internal diameter is about 2 inch, coil line wide is about 0.4 inch.

Widely Application: Ponytail holders applicables thin hair, medium-thick hair, thick hair, straight hair, curly hair and wavy hair etc. You can use our hair ties in various occasions such as sports, party, ceremony, graduation,stage show, dating and more

Hair Protection: These elastic hair ties ropes can hold your hair tightly while working, sporting or playing, or other outdoor activities, no need to worries about slipping for everyday using, they will keep your hair firmly and not easy to loose.
